title: Clojure source files (.clj) missing from run archive
evidence: find rep1/ -name '*.clj' returns 0 files; deps.edn:1 references src/ and test/ paths but directories do not exist in the archive
suggestion: Ensure retort archive step includes src/ and test/ directories for Clojure runs
